name: Grilled Ham, Caramelized Onion, Apple, & Cheese Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup caramelized Onion, at room temperature
4 thin ham slices, at room temperature
cored and sliced about 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush one side of each slice of bread with a thin coating of Dijon Glaze.
2. Spread mayonnaise on 1 slice per sandwich.
3. Layer 1/4 of the onion and ham, a layer of apple slices, a slice of cheese on the mayonnaise slice, and top with remaining slice of bread.
4. Brush the top and bottom of each sandwich with oil.
5. Grill in a pan or sandwich grill (do not press down on the grill) until the bread is crisp and golden brown and the cheese has melted.
